title: Luscious Vietnamese Tofu Bowl
description: A tangy, gooey low‑carb meal‑prep bowl bursting with nutmeg‑infused tofu and fresh veggies.
instructions: Press tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut into 1 cm cubes.
Whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, lime juice, toasted sesame oil, ground nutmeg, sriracha, and hoisin sauce in a bowl.
Toss tofu cubes in the sauce until evenly coated, cover, and marinate in the fridge for 30 minutes.
While tofu marinates, slice bell pepper, shred cucumber, and shred carrots.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and cook tofu for 8 minutes, flipping halfway, until edges are golden.
Transfer cooked tofu to a large bowl and add sliced vegetables and chopped cilantro.
Mix everything gently to combine flavors, then serve immediately or divide into containers for meal prep.
Reheat tofu bowl in the microwave for 2 minutes before eating, if desired.
